name: Views Bulk Edit
description: Allows bulk edition of entity field values.

suggests.drupal/views_bulk_operations: Get VBO for all the views benefits like batching, ability to select all view results or persistent selection across pages

consumes_plugin_types: VBO Action (Plugin/Action, extends views_bulk_operations ViewsBulkOperationsActionBase) — the 'views_bulk_edit' Modify field values action
core Action (Plugin/Action, extends EntityActionBase, derived per fieldable entity type as 'entity:edit_action')
